title: Element Advantage Table
description: The element set and a sparse advantage-multiplier matrix consumed by the damage formula's element layer. FAITHFUL BASE: DDTank's element layer is additive (attacker ElementPower minus defender ElementResist); the advantage multiplier is a tasteful modern layer (ADR-0005) that defaults to 1.0 for every unspecified pair, so with no overrides the behaviour is pure DDTank additive. FIRST-PASS TUNING — the advantages below (Fire>Wind>Land>Water>Fire cycle, Light<->Dark mutual) are a felt, testable starting point, NOT canonical balance; the designer will iterate these.

elements.description: The active element set. Must match the Sim.Content.Element enum.

advantages.description: Sparse overrides. Any (attacker, defender) pair not listed defaults to 1.0.

multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the element bonus when attacker's element hits defender's element. 1.0 = neutral, >1 advantage, <1 disadvantage.
